basics.name: Soumya Sai Vanka
basics.label: Doctoral Researcher
basics.summary: As a musician, songwriter, producer, and artist, I offer a uniqueperspective to AI research in multitrack mixing. My research approachis user-centric, incorporating real-world practices and involvingprototyping and extensive user evaluations. With a background inPhysics, I bring logical thinking to the table, and my participation in co-curriculars and team activities demonstrates my well-rounded skills forboth individual and collaborative success. I am an active volunteer andthrive on exploring new topics, cultures, and traveling.

publications.name: The Role of Communication and Reference Songs in the Mixing Process: Insights From Professional Mix Engineers
publications.publisher: Journal of the Audio Engineering Society
publications.summary: Effective music mixing requires technical and creative finesse, but clear communication with the client is crucial. The mixing engineer must grasp the client's expectations and preferences and collaborate to achieve the desired sound. The tacit agreement for the desired sound of the mix is established using guides like reference songs and demo mixes exchanged between the artist and the engineer.

publications.name: Adoption of AI Technology in Music Mixing Workflow: An Investigation
publications.summary: The integration of artificial intelligence (AI) technology in the music industry is driving a significant change in the way music is being composed, produced and mixed. This study investigates the current state of AI in the mixing workflows and its adoption by different user groups.

publications.name: Intelligent Music Production: Music Production Style Transfer and Analysis of Mix Similarity
publications.summary: We present a poster introducing the idea of mixing style transfer as a user centric approach to AI-based mixing.

publications.name: Deep Learning for Automatic Mixing
publications.publisher: Proc. of the 23rd Int. Society for Music Information Retrieval Conf. (ISMIR)
publications.summary: Mixing is a central task within audio post-production where expert knowledge is required to deliver professional quality content. This tutorial discusses deep learning approaches for automatic mixing, addressing challenges and providing insights for researchers and practitioners.

publications.name: AI for Multitrack Mixing - A Workshop
publications.summary: This workshop explores the application of AI technologies in multitrack mixing, providing insights into the future of mixing workflows.

projects.name: The Sound of One Hand CLAPping
projects.summary: Evolutionary search over VSTi synthesiser parameters using CLAP embeddings as a fitness function. Project for Timbre Hackathon 2024
